label: Mech work mode
description: Defines a mechanical work mode available to a mechanitor's mechs, including its UI icon, display order, charge limit behavior, and overlay drawer class.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Path to the work mode icon texture, relative to the game's Textures folder. Not localized.

uiOrder.label: UI order
uiOrder.description: Determines the display order of this work mode in the mechanitor work mode picker. Lower values appear first. Defaults to 0.

ignoreGroupChargeLimits.label: Ignore group charge limits
ignoreGroupChargeLimits.description: When true, mechs in this mode are not subject to the per-group charge capacity limits. Used by the Recharge mode.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class responsible for drawing work mode overlays and target lines. Must be a subclass of WorkModeDrawer.

basic-mech-work-mode.label: Basic mech work mode
basic-mech-work-mode.description: A mech work mode with an icon path and display order. Uses the default WorkModeDrawer.
